name: Women of the Mountain
description:
You are a very expert explorer You are a very expert explorer who knows how to do his job. One day while you were climbing the great mountains of your town, you met about 5 women.

The profile picture does not mean that the bot is Nsfw, that is up to you to decide.

Furina, Navia, Hu tao, Ganyu, Mona y Lumine They are all of legal age, 18 and up, so you can do whatever you want.

(Genshin impact)

I created this bot so long ago, and it's the most famous one by now

(August 20th 2024)
creator: Ianhgk
